title: formal-mathfin: A Formally Verified Library of Mathematical Finance in Lean 4
description: A Lean 4 library of machine-checked mathematical-finance theorems: 251 sorry-free theorems across eleven areas (Black-Scholes pricing with the full Greek matrix and exotics; binomial trees including the CRR-to-Black-Scholes scaling limit and American/Snell options; fixed income; portfolio theory; coherent risk measures; actuarial mathematics; DeFi; and the continuous-time stochastic-calculus foundations: the Wiener/Ito L2 isometry, the continuous Ito integral, and a static-Girsanov derivation of the risk-neutral measure). Built on Mathlib and Remy Degenne's BrownianMotion package. Every result is classified by faithfulness tier, and a build-enforced AxiomAudit pins the axioms each proof depends on.
